mechanics.excerpt: Fortunately; it was miss: ing MechWarrior. Without someone like Erik in the cockpit, the machine was only SO much cold metal wrapped around damp ened fusion engine. Erik and took cover behind the crates at just the right time Four guards burst through the same door we had used t0 enter the bay; SMGs already chattering ad slinging about deadly hail of lead.
